text: Walking through these clean, sharp halls I feel an odd mix of anticipation and curiosity. The orderliness of the space feels almost clinical, and I sense the presence of unseen thoughts and possibilities behind the glass. Entering the exhibit, the vibrant colors and futuristic energy of the R+D wall stimulate my thoughts. I feel inspired, but also slightly distant—confronted by the ongoing dance between human creativity and technological progress. Here, I am reminded of my own inexhaustible urge to question, to reflect: how do we belong in a world shaped by such relentless innovation?
